title: aster iodochrous
intro: Aster iodochrous, also known as Sweet Aster, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to eastern Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. Aster iodochrous can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can also be used to make a medicinal oil for topical application.
